summary: REQ-2 and REQ-3 appear implemented: HeroSection now uses a centralized HERO_FUTURISTIC_DARK_BG_URL constant from assets.ts and applies it as a full-screen cover background with additional contrast/toned-down overlay layers. REQ-1 (the actual image asset file) is not shown as added in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a realistic, advanced-looking, futuristic dark full-screen hero background image and add it as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png.
missing_requirements.reason: Diff shows no added files (Added: 0), and there is no evidence the PNG file was created under frontend/public/assets/generated.
evidence: frontend/src/config/assets.ts references /assets/generated/hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png but no corresponding file addition is shown

hallucinated_features.description: Updated internal tracking/metadata files (project_state.json) unrelated to the requested hero background/image integration.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request changing project_state.json; it’s not part of implementing the asset, hero section, or asset configuration requirements.
